title: War Italian Style
writer: Franco Castellano, Giuseppe Moccia, Vittorio Vighi
actors: Franco Franchi, Ciccio Ingrassia, Buster Keaton
plot: In May 1943, two American soldiers, Joe and Frank, of Italian descent are searching the North African desert for a German general called Von Kassler, when they are captured by Von Kassler aide Inge Schultze who lets them escape wi...
